Instructors

Simon Apen-Sadler

Simon Apen-Sadler has over 20 years of experience in Shotokan Karate and started at 8 years old. He is currently a 4th Dan Black Belt with the JKA. He continues to train regularly at Cambridge Karate Club. He previously trained under Jim Lewis with the KWF and the SKA under Greg Durant.
